problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
